astra-core.reason: pure schema, identifiers, hashes and diagnostic value types

astra-runtime.reason: world, state machine, save and replay lifecycle

astra-engine.reason: pure facade that only re-exports EngineCore crates

astra-plugin-abi.reason: pure ABI schema and function pointer declarations

astra-plugin.reason: plugin loader, registry and FFI calls

astra-platform.reason: pure platform schema, channel and validation contract

astra-platform-common.reason: pure platform resource, ordering and storage helpers

astra-platform-android.reason: GameActivity host lifecycle, provider selection and native resource failures

astra-platform-web.reason: Web platform and browser probe lifecycle

astra-property.reason: pure schema metadata facade without runtime registry

astra-headless-protocol.reason: pure schema and JSONL framing contract

astra-product-host.reason: pure schema and product orchestration facade

astra-platform-headless.reason: Headless host session and resource lifecycle

astra-headless-test.reason: pure test harness facade with driver-owned observability

astra-headless.reason: Headless CLI session, artifact and diagnostic lifecycle

astra-test.reason: pure migration diagnostic facade after ScenarioRunner retirement

astra-observability.reason: pure sink infrastructure where self-logging would recurse

astra-ui-component-host.reason: isolated UI component host process and protocol lifecycle

astra-player-web.reason: Web Player package and host lifecycle

astra-player-android.reason: Android Player native entrypoint and Runtime/provider session lifecycle

astra-crash-reporter.reason: Windows crash reporter handshake and dump lifecycle

astra-emu-fvp-rfvp-core.reason: FVP VM tick and context execution lifecycle

astra-emu-translation-openai-compatible.reason: translation request, retry and circuit-breaker lifecycle

astra-emu-manager.reason: Manager host, platform source, renderer, audio and input lifecycle

astra-emu-cli.reason: explicit native launch and headless provider/session/artifact lifecycle
